language_found: We detected that your profile language is {language}. If you'd like to change it, choose from the options below:
language_not_found: We couldn't detect your language. Please choose from the available options:
ask_public_username:: Type in your username for your profile. DON'T use your Telegram username - create a new one. It's for public. Use more than 3 and not more than 30 symbols in your username.
invalid_public_username:
Username must be 3-30 characters. Only letters, numbers, _ . - are allowed.

Examples: Cool_Player, Gigachad.2026, Pro-Gamer_99
